label: Storyteller
description: Defines a storyteller AI: its portrait, adaptation curves, and the list of incident-scheduling comps that drive gameplay pacing.

listOrder.label: List order
listOrder.description: Sort order in the storyteller selection screen. Lower values appear first.

listVisible.label: List visible
listVisible.description: Whether this storyteller appears in the selection screen.

tutorialMode.label: Tutorial mode
tutorialMode.description: If true, this storyteller uses tutorial pacing instead of normal incident scheduling.

disableAdaptiveTraining.label: Disable adaptive training
disableAdaptiveTraining.description: If true, adaptive training tips are suppressed for this storyteller.

disableAlerts.label: Disable alerts
disableAlerts.description: If true, all alerts are hidden when this storyteller is active.

disablePermadeath.label: Disable permadeath
disablePermadeath.description: If true, permadeath mode is disabled for this storyteller.

forcedDifficulty.label: Forced difficulty
forcedDifficulty.description: Forces a specific DifficultyDef when this storyteller is selected. Leave unset to allow player choice.

portraitLarge.label: Portrait (large)
portraitLarge.description: Texture path for the large storyteller portrait shown in the selection screen.

portraitTiny.label: Portrait (tiny)
portraitTiny.description: Texture path for the small storyteller icon shown in the HUD.

adaptDaysMin.label: Adapt days (min)
adaptDaysMin.description: Minimum value of the adaptation-days accumulator.

adaptDaysMax.label: Adapt days (max)
adaptDaysMax.description: Maximum value of the adaptation-days accumulator.

adaptDaysGameStartGraceDays.label: Adapt days game-start grace
adaptDaysGameStartGraceDays.description: Days of grace at game start before adaptation tracking begins.

populationIntentFactorFromPopCurve.label: Population intent factor from population curve
populationIntentFactorFromPopCurve.description: Multiplier to population intent based on current colony population. X = population, Y = factor.

populationIntentFactorFromPopAdaptDaysCu.label: Population intent factor from adapt-days curve
populationIntentFactorFromPopAdaptDaysCu.description: Multiplier to population intent based on current adapt-days value. X = adapt days, Y = factor.

pointsFactorFromDaysPassed.label: Points factor from days passed
pointsFactorFromDaysPassed.description: Multiplier to incident threat points based on days since game start. X = days, Y = factor.

pointsFactorFromAdaptDays.label: Points factor from adapt days
pointsFactorFromAdaptDays.description: Multiplier to incident threat points based on adapt-days value. X = adapt days, Y = factor.

adaptDaysLossFromColonistLostByPostPopul.label: Adapt days loss from colonist lost (by post-loss population)
adaptDaysLossFromColonistLostByPostPopul.description: Adapt-days subtracted when a colonist dies, based on the remaining population. X = remaining population, Y = days lost.

adaptDaysLossFromColonistViolentlyDowned.label: Adapt days loss from colonist violently downed (by population)
adaptDaysLossFromColonistViolentlyDowned.description: Adapt-days subtracted when a colonist is violently downed, based on population. X = population, Y = days lost.

adaptDaysGrowthRateCurve.label: Adapt days growth rate curve
adaptDaysGrowthRateCurve.description: Daily rate at which adapt-days accumulates, based on the current value. X = current adapt days, Y = growth rate.

comps.label: Comps
comps.description: List of storyteller comp properties that drive incident scheduling. Each item carries a Class attribute naming the concrete StorytellerCompProperties subclass.

basic-storyteller.label: Basic storyteller
basic-storyteller.description: Storyteller with portrait paths and an empty comps list.
